name: appsec-advisor-scripts
description: Optional Node dependencies for appsec-advisor's Mermaid validator (scripts/mermaid_validate.mjs). The plugin itself is Python; this file exists only so operators can run `npm install` once inside scripts/ to enable authoritative Mermaid grammar checking in QA Check 16. When jsdom is absent the validator falls back to regex-only checks and logs a skip warning.
